title: eleocharis dulcis
intro: Eleocharis dulcis, commonly known as water chestnut or Chinese water chestnut, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-bacterial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis dulcis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often consumed raw, dried, or cooked, and can also be made into tea, powder, or capsules for its medicinal properties.
